calendar.matters:
Plaintiffs Request For Oral Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-12-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:35am and concluding at 9:44am.

Plaintiff Progressive West Insurance Company appearing represented by Erin Peikes, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Javon Cruz not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Progressive West Insurance, and against Defendant Javon Cruz, as follows:

Damages: $45,738.17
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $529.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $46,267.17

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
